title: Implement Prism KeybindInput
description: Create a game-settings-specific keybind capture control. It should capture keyboard/gamepad input clearly, stay neutral by default, support disabled/readOnly behavior, and avoid behaving like a generic text input.

title: Implement Prism Carousel
description: Implement a game-friendly rotating/scrolling content selector, not a marketing-site carousel. Consider controller/mouse affordances, paging, and restrained motion using existing motion tokens.

title: Implement Prism Tag component
description: Implement Tag as a small game-UI label/status marker. User prefers Tag naming and dislikes chips/badges/pills framing. Use neutral defaults and slot/style escape hatches where needed.
close_reason: Rejected for Prism: Tag was deemed the wrong abstraction for this library and should not be rebuilt from stale branch work.

title: Add pre-motion styleOverrides to Button and Select
description: Expose typed component-local visual style override callbacks for Button and Select so consumers can customize stateful visuals before useMotion without adding a generic recipe/styled framework.
acceptance_criteria: Button and Select expose typed styleOverrides; overrides run before useMotion; slotProps remain raw post-motion winners; Button and Select playground stories demonstrate custom animated visuals; npm test/typecheck/lint/build pass.

title: Build Prism cross-platform UI foundations
description: Deliver the approved Prism roadmap in dependency order: native-first controller selection, MUI-like responsive breakpoints, NotificationsProvider and staged overlay adapters, fixed-geometry virtual collections, and a Theme Workbench. Track Luau Bridge v2 as a later child rather than a launch blocker.
acceptance_criteria: Each approved roadmap area is represented by a child bead with explicit scope and dependencies; shipped public behavior has playground coverage and passes typecheck, lint, build, and read-only QA; rejected Tag work is closed rather than rebuilt.

title: Add MUI-style responsive breakpoint hooks
description: Add configurable xs/sm/md/lg/xl theme breakpoints and React hooks for resolving responsive values and preferred input. Keep the first interface hook-driven; do not widen every Prism prop. Use Roblox viewport and input signals while preserving native safe-area and StyleQuery behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Theme types/defaults/merging expose immutable configurable breakpoint values; useBreakpoint, useResponsiveValue, and usePreferredInput are exported and reactive; deterministic pure breakpoint resolution is unit tested; a playground story demonstrates structural layout changes; README/architecture guidance documents viewport versus container behavior; quality gates and QA pass.
close_reason: Shipped responsive theme breakpoints, target/camera-aware hooks, preferred-input hook, tests, docs, and playground story; independent QA passed.

title: Deepen Prism overlay adapters
description: Evolve the existing layer portal kernel through separate trigger-anchored, screen, outside-press, and capture adapters. Avoid a monolithic mode-driven Overlay interface. Use real consumers to justify each seam.
acceptance_criteria: NotificationStack consumes the screen adapter; Select migrates to the trigger-anchored adapter; outside-press interaction is separated from visual Backdrop when proven; public behavior remains compatible; overlay stories, quality gates, and QA pass.

title: Migrate Select to TriggerOverlayLayer
description: Replace Select's bespoke trigger layout and LayerPortal implementation with the proven TriggerOverlayLayer adapter while preserving public props, slots, placement behavior, scrolling, and selection.
acceptance_criteria: Select no longer owns bespoke portal target and local-coordinate plumbing; behavior and public types remain compatible; Select story exercises open/dismiss/selection; quality gates and QA pass.

title: Separate outside-press interaction from visual Backdrop
description: Extract a non-selectable OutsidePressLayer from Popover's current opacity-zero Backdrop capture. Support excluded trigger/panel surfaces required by Popover/Menu and Select. Keep visual Backdrop responsible for dimming rather than invisible dismissal interaction.
acceptance_criteria: OutsidePressLayer never enters controller selection; Popover/Menu preserve dismissal; Select adopts the adapter during TriggerOverlayLayer migration; visual Backdrop remains compatible; nested/topmost expansion waits for demonstrated consumers; quality gates and QA pass.

title: Build fixed-geometry virtual collections
description: Build and benchmark a Prism-native fixed-geometry windowing module, then expose VirtualList and VirtualGrid. Keep the geometry engine independent of controller and responsive work; integrate those foundations only in the final inventory showcase.
acceptance_criteria: Range math is benchmarked and unit tested; VirtualList and VirtualGrid mount cells proportional to viewport size; a controller-responsive 10,000-item inventory showcase passes profiling and QA; variable sizes, true recycling, and virtualized Draggable remain deferred.

title: Benchmark fixed virtual range strategies
description: Compare eager ScrollArea rendering, a minimal Prism fixed-range calculator, and a small compatible virtualized-list-lua proof only if it can share the exact React runtime. Measure mount time, instance count, memory, frame time, and blank-window behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Results cover 100 through 10,000 realistic rows/tiles; the chosen approach and rejected dependency are documented with measurements; no production dependency is added without evidence.

title: Implement Prism VirtualList
description: Implement a vertical fixed-height VirtualList over a manually sized ScrollingFrame with stable keys, overscan, visible-range callbacks, and scrollToIndex/scrollToKey behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Mounted rows plateau with dataset growth; boundary and sparse-window math is unit tested; scrolling does not show blank rows at target velocities; public types/story/quality gates/QA pass.

title: Implement Prism VirtualGrid
description: Implement a uniform-cell VirtualGrid on the shared fixed-range engine with explicit or viewport-derived column count, stable keys, overscan, and imperative scrolling.
acceptance_criteria: Mounted cells remain proportional to visible rows/columns; resize and column-count changes preserve valid ranges; public types/story/quality gates/QA pass.

title: Build controller-responsive virtual inventory showcase
description: Demonstrate 10,000 inventory items with logical controller selection, scroll-to-selected handoff, and responsive xs-sm-md-lg-xl columns after those foundations land.
acceptance_criteria: Controller selection never disappears; columns adapt through Prism responsive hooks; profiling acceptance is recorded; matching playground entry, quality gates, and QA pass.

title: Build Prism Theme Workbench and official presets
description: Establish explicit official theme presets, then build a calm Studio playground workbench for editing ThemeOverride values and previewing real responsive Prism compositions. Keep editor/export work independent from the notification-backed composition gallery.
acceptance_criteria: Official light/dark preset decisions are explicit; editor state never mutates defaults; semantic tokens, motion, shadows, and breakpoints are editable; TypeScript/Luau-oriented output is generated; responsive composition gallery passes quality gates and QA.

title: Establish first-class Prism light and dark theme presets
description: Review the existing story-only dark override and stale branch reference, then ship intentional immutable official light/dark themes with semantic contrast and shared token invariants.
acceptance_criteria: DEFAULT_THEME and the approved dark preset are exported intentionally; every public story can preview both without duplicating the dark override; contrast and token-resolution checks pass.

title: Implement Theme Workbench editor and export core
description: Build editor state for semantic colors, spacing, radius, typography, shadows, motion, and breakpoints; provide undo/reset/presets and generate a minimal ThemeOverride as copyable TypeScript plus a Luau-oriented ModuleScript path.
acceptance_criteria: Edits create new frozen overrides; defaults are never mutated; generated output is deterministic and omits unchanged values; ui-labs target sizing drives responsive preview; quality gates and QA pass.

title: Build Theme Workbench composition gallery
description: Add calm real-world settings, menu, notification, and HUD compositions with viewport presets and interaction-state review rather than a monotonous grid of isolated cards.
acceptance_criteria: Compositions exercise responsive hooks, official themes, notifications, overlays, and state styling across representative viewport sizes; playground entry matches validated modules; QA passes.

title: Rebuild Luau Bridge around an internal registry
description: Later roadmap item: deepen the bridge module behind its existing mountPrism/update/destroy interface using explicit runtime schemas, shared decoders, per-control adapters, generated Luau type definitions, and parity checks. Do not expose public adapter registration initially.
acceptance_criteria: Existing bridge behavior is captured; registry migration preserves the public interface; supported controls have generated Luau definitions and parity checks; missing public controls are intentionally added or documented; stable node keys are evaluated; quality gates pass.

title: Add native-first controller UI selection support
description: Implement controller selection through Roblox-native properties and lifecycle behavior. Do not require SelectionScope, providers, or wrapper abstractions. Add first-class native-shaped props to unambiguous controls and layout groups, then handle compound controls and overlay enter/restore/back behavior in dedicated children.
acceptance_criteria: Single-target controls expose native-shaped selection props; layout primitives expose SelectionGroup behavior; selected visuals are consistent where Prism owns them; compound controls define intentional navigation; Select/Menu/Modal enter and restore GuiService.SelectedObject; no public SelectionScope is introduced; playground coverage, docs, quality gates, and QA pass.

title: Expose native selection props on single-target controls and layout groups
description: Add shared native-shaped SelectionProps and SelectionGroupProps; wire them to Button, Pressable, Checkbox, Switch, Input, KeybindInput, Slider, Box, Stack, and ScrollArea while preserving disabled behavior and slotProps as the final escape hatch.
acceptance_criteria: Managed props map to the correct native root; disabled controls are not selectable unless slotProps intentionally overrides; type contracts and a controller navigation story cover the interface; no wrapper/provider/global navigation graph is added; quality gates and QA pass.
close_reason: Shipped native selection props on seven single-target controls and native selection-group props on Box, Stack, and ScrollArea with runtime/type coverage, docs, controller story, and independent QA.

title: Add intentional selection behavior to compound controls
description: Define target and directional navigation semantics for SegmentedControl, Tabs, StepperInput, Draggable, and other multi-target controls where one component-level neighbor set would be ambiguous.
acceptance_criteria: Each compound control documents and demonstrates which internal targets participate in selection; disabled targets are skipped; controller behavior is covered in matching playground stories; quality gates and QA pass.

title: Implement overlay selection enter and restore behavior
description: When Select, Menu, and Modal open, select the correct eligible descendant using native GuiService behavior; contain selection where appropriate; restore the prior valid selection or trigger on close; keep portal ancestry explicit.
acceptance_criteria: Select prefers its selected/first-enabled option; Menu selects its first enabled action; Modal selects its first eligible descendant; closing restores prior valid selection; disabled/unmounted targets repair safely; matching stories and QA pass.

title: Add topmost controller-back dismissal for overlays
description: Add ButtonB/Escape dismissal only after the staged overlay stack provides a topmost dismissible record. Avoid independent global listeners that close nested overlays together or steal gameplay input.
acceptance_criteria: Only the topmost dismissible Prism overlay handles controller back; gameplay input is unaffected when no dismissible overlay is active; nested behavior and stories are covered; quality gates and QA pass.

title: Track Fallow cleanup backlog
description: Parent epic for turning the latest npm run fallow advisory output into tracked cleanup work. The scan currently fails on dead-code, duplication, and health thresholds, while overall maintainability remains good.
acceptance_criteria: Fallow findings are represented by child beads; each child bead is resolved or explicitly superseded; npm run fallow output no longer contains the tracked issue category or has documented suppressions.

title: Resolve Fallow unused file findings
description: Fallow reports three files as unreachable from configured entry points: src/lib/components/_shared/PortalLayer.tsx, src/lib/components/_shared/useTriggerOverlayLayout.ts, and src/playground/KeybindInputPlayground.tsx. Determine whether each should be removed, wired into a real entry point, or suppressed with justification.
acceptance_criteria: Each reported unused file is removed, imported by an intended entry point, or documented with a narrow fallow suppression; npm run fallow no longer reports these three files as unused.
close_reason: Resolved unused-file findings by deleting stale shared wrapper files and making standalone playground files explicit Fallow entries.

title: Reduce internal clone groups in LuauBridge
description: Fallow reports fourteen clone groups, about 170 lines, within src/lib/bridge/LuauBridge.tsx. Review repeated prop readers, render branches, and conversion helpers for extraction while keeping the bridge schema behavior stable.
acceptance_criteria: LuauBridge internal clone groups are reduced or each remaining group is justified; bridge smoke coverage or representative playground mounting confirms behavior; Fallow reports fewer LuauBridge clone groups.

title: Consolidate small media and visual style clone families
description: Fallow reports smaller clone families across Box/Image, Icon/Image, and Input/Select styles. Audit these repeated size, image, icon, and visual-style helpers for shared utilities only where the abstraction remains clear.
acceptance_criteria: Small media/style clone families are reduced or explicitly left in place with rationale; no public component behavior changes; Fallow clone output for Box/Image, Icon/Image, and Input/Select styles is improved or documented.

title: Split TooltipBase high-complexity implementation
description: Fallow's top refactoring target is src/lib/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx: TooltipBase is 270 lines with critical complexity. Split behavior into smaller helpers/components while preserving trigger-anchored overlay behavior, portal mounting, placement, hover/focus/touch interactions, and public props.
acceptance_criteria: TooltipBase complexity and size are materially reduced; Tooltip story or playground smoke test verifies visible tooltip behavior; npm run typecheck, lint, build, and fallow are rerun with improved Tooltip metrics.

title: Split ModalBase screen-overlay complexity
description: Fallow flags src/lib/components/Modal/Modal.tsx as a hotspot and critical complexity risk: ModalBase is 408 lines with high cyclomatic and cognitive complexity. Extract size resolution, backdrop/portal behavior, focus/close interactions, and panel rendering into smaller units without changing the Modal API.
acceptance_criteria: ModalBase size and complexity are materially reduced; modal open/close/backdrop behavior is smoke tested through the matching playground/story surface; normal quality gates pass and Fallow Modal metrics improve.

title: Split high-impact shared style resolution helpers
description: Fallow ranks src/lib/components/_shared/useResolvedStyleProps.ts as high impact because many components depend on it and functions such as mergeSharedStyleProps and useResolvedStyleProps exceed complexity thresholds. Split or simplify shared style resolution carefully to avoid broad component regressions.
acceptance_criteria: Shared style helpers are smaller and easier to test; representative dependent components still typecheck and render; fallow health for useResolvedStyleProps.ts improves without broad API churn.

title: Reduce large control component function sizes
description: Fallow reports many very large component functions, including StepperInputBase, SliderBase, DraggableComponent, KeybindInputBase, TabsBase, ButtonBase, SelectBase, and PopoverBase. Triage and split these into focused child refactors, prioritizing behavior-heavy controls with clear smoke surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: A prioritized breakdown exists or the largest control functions are split directly; each touched public component has matching smoke/playground verification; Fallow large-function output is reduced or follow-up beads are created for remaining controls.

title: Triage Fallow hotspot files
description: Fallow reports four churn/complexity hotspots: src/lib/components/Modal/Modal.tsx, src/lib/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx, src/lib/bridge/LuauBridge.tsx, and src/playground/main.client.ts. Review whether existing cleanup beads cover each hotspot and create narrower follow-ups for any risk not covered.
acceptance_criteria: Each hotspot has an owner bead or documented rationale for no action; completed cleanup improves or intentionally suppresses the hotspot signal; bd links/notes make the remaining risk visible.

title: Resolve Fallow unused export findings
description: Fallow reports unused exports in layering.tsx, StepperInput/utils.ts, useResolvedStyleProps.ts, and StoryTheme re-exports. Audit each export for public API intent, internal usage gaps, and safe removal versus suppression.
acceptance_criteria: Unused export and type-export findings are eliminated or justified with narrow suppressions; public API removals are reflected in barrel files and docs/tests where applicable; npm run fallow no longer reports the tracked export findings.
close_reason: Resolved unused export and type-export findings by privatizing locally-used helpers, removing unused story/shared type re-exports, and dropping an unnecessary Slider GuiZIndex re-export.

title: Audit unused Roblox and lint devDependencies
description: Fallow reports unused devDependencies: @rbxts/compiler-types, @rbxts/fusion, @rbxts/iris, @rbxts/roact, @rbxts/types, @rbxts/vide, @typescript-eslint/parser, and eslint-plugin-roblox-ts. Confirm whether these are toolchain/runtime requirements, optional ecosystem peer support, or removable package metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Each reported dependency is removed, moved, referenced by configuration that Fallow can see, or documented/suppressed with rationale; lockfile/package metadata stay consistent; npm run fallow no longer reports unjustified unused devDependencies.
close_reason: Removed unused Fusion/Iris/Roact/Vide devDependencies; documented required TypeScript/ESLint/roblox-ts tooling dependencies in Fallow ignoreDependencies.

title: Extract shared overlay substrate for Popover and Tooltip
description: Fallow reports related clone groups across src/lib/components/Popover/Popover.tsx and src/lib/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx. These are both trigger-anchored overlays and should be reviewed for shared layout, portal, interaction, and panel rendering substrate without changing public behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Popover and Tooltip duplicated blocks are reduced through an existing or new shared helper where appropriate; behavior is covered by smoke/playground verification; npm run fallow reports fewer or no Popover/Tooltip clone groups.
close_reason: Extracted shared trigger-anchored overlay layer for Popover and Tooltip, split their overlay surface rendering, mounted combined overlay smoke test, and verified typecheck/lint/build plus reduced Fallow duplication.

title: Extract shared binary control substrate for Checkbox and Switch
description: Fallow reports seven clone groups, about 231 lines, across Checkbox and Switch. Audit the shared binary-control concerns such as visual state resolution, input handling, disabled/loading/readOnly behavior, and common decorators.
acceptance_criteria: Checkbox and Switch share appropriate helper code or components without changing their API; representative stories/smoke coverage still works; Fallow clone groups across these files are materially reduced.

title: Extract shared action trigger code for Button and Select
description: Fallow reports three clone groups, about 65 lines, across Button and Select. Review shared trigger styling, pressability, icon/text layout, and interaction-state code for a focused helper that preserves each component's public API.
acceptance_criteria: Button and Select duplicated action-trigger blocks are reduced or explicitly justified; typecheck and relevant smoke coverage pass; Fallow reports fewer Button/Select clone groups.

title: Extract shared collection navigation patterns for Tabs and SegmentedControl
description: Fallow reports three clone groups, about 100 lines, across SegmentedControl and Tabs. Review shared tab/segment value selection, indicator layout, child rendering, and interaction-state handling for reusable primitives.
acceptance_criteria: Tabs and SegmentedControl duplication is reduced through shared code where behavior aligns; keyboard/controller and selection behavior remain intact; Fallow reports fewer clone groups between the files.

title: Extract shared progress rail helpers for Progress and Slider
description: Fallow reports four clone groups, about 78 lines, across Progress and Slider. Review track/fill sizing, color resolution, orientation handling, and rail rendering for reusable helpers without mixing interactive slider capture concerns into Progress.
acceptance_criteria: Progress and Slider duplicate rail/rendering code is reduced where concerns genuinely match; slider drag behavior and progress display remain unchanged; Fallow reports fewer Progress/Slider clone groups.

title: Extract shared layout alignment helpers for Draggable and Stack
description: Fallow reports seven clone groups, about 150 lines, across Draggable and Stack. Review duplicated horizontal/vertical alignment and flex layout resolution code for a shared layout utility that does not couple drag ordering behavior to Stack.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicated alignment/flex helpers are shared or justified; Draggable ordering behavior and Stack layout behavior remain unchanged; Fallow reports fewer Draggable/Stack clone groups.

title: Implement Prism Notifications provider and stack
description: Implement a React-first NotificationsProvider/useNotifications interface with a rendered stack, queued transient records, safe placement, lifecycle timing, updates/dismissal, and restrained motion. Reuse the screen-overlay adapter without exposing internal store terminology or coupling notifications to trigger-anchored overlays.
acceptance_criteria: Consumers can show, update, dismiss, and clear notifications through useNotifications; queue and max-visible behavior are deterministic; safe-area and reduced-motion behavior are respected; public types, story coverage, quality gates, and read-only QA pass.

title: Implement notification record store and queue
description: Implement deterministic notification IDs, queued/open/closing/removed lifecycle, max-visible promotion, update/dismiss/clear semantics, dismissal reasons, and injected scheduling for tests. Keep this implementation internal.
acceptance_criteria: Queue ordering, overflow, update/dismiss races, timer start/pause/cleanup, and destroy behavior are deterministic and unit tested without React.

title: Implement NotificationsProvider and useNotifications
description: Expose a React-first NotificationsProvider and useNotifications interface over the internal store. Keep theme and LayerCollector locality; do not expose runtime terminology or a process-wide singleton.
acceptance_criteria: Consumers can show, update, dismiss, and clear notifications through the hook; multiple providers remain independent; public types and type contracts pass.

title: Render NotificationStack with motion and story coverage
description: Render queued notifications through the screen-overlay adapter with semantic intent, optional icon/action/close affordances, safe placement, max-visible stack reflow, and reduced-motion-aware presence transitions.
acceptance_criteria: Placement and z policy are correct; queued notifications promote after exits; action/close/timeout reasons work; responsive/safe-area/reduced-motion behavior is demonstrated; quality gates and QA pass.

title: Implement Prism Tabs distinct from SegmentedControl
description: Implement Tabs for content navigation later in the roadmap. Keep it distinct from SegmentedControl, which is for visible game-settings option selection. Avoid SaaS tab aesthetics; make it fit Roblox/game UI.
close_reason: Implemented Prism Tabs with data-driven consumer API, story, smoke test, and live Studio validation

title: Implement Prism Popover anchored surface
description: Build Popover next as a trigger-anchored content surface on top of shared layering seams (LayerPortal/useTriggerOverlayLayout/useOverlayLocalPosition/usePortalTarget). Use Tooltip and SelectDropdown as reference patterns. Avoid a generic overlay mega-abstraction; Popover should become the substrate for Menu/ContextMenu and other anchored surfaces.
close_reason: Implemented Popover anchored surface component with public exports, story, type coverage, Luau bridge support, and Tooltip conflict cleanup.

title: Implement Prism Menu on Popover
description: Build Menu after Popover, using Popover rather than duplicating overlay/layering logic. Preserve game-UX direction, mouse/keyboard/controller affordances where appropriate, and slotProps escape hatches.

title: Clean up Prism Dialog/Modal layering
description: Move over/clean up Dialog or Modal after Popover/Menu groundwork. Align with shared layering where appropriate while keeping screen-overlay behavior distinct from trigger-anchored overlays.
